page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package implements XGBoost and LightGBM in survival data with partiallikelihood function of cox ph model and smoothed C-index as loss functions. gbm and random forests are also provided in Xsurv function to fit the model.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package implements XGBoost and LightGBM in survival data with partiallikelihood function of cox ph model and smoothed C-index as loss functions. gbm and random forests are also provided in Xsurv function to fit the model.
